author: Frosty40
name: X-WING: Shared N-gram Tables + Cubric Per-Order Scaling
blurb: Podracer engine with chunk-based shared n-gram tables (all ranks see full val data) + Cubric per-order adaptive alpha. Orders 2-3 suppressed (0.30-0.45x), orders 5-7 boosted (1.88-2.0x). 3-seed mean val_bpb=0.5644. Shared-table insight credited to @deanbrr (PR #779).
